Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of 51% of HarborCrest Robotics Holdings Limited (incorporated in Hong Kong; HKEX-listed), by Crescent Ventures Fund IV, L.P.
HarborCrest Robotics Holdings Limited: C R   N o . :  3 1 2 3 4 5 6; BR No.: 7-6543212-000; registered office: Unit 1901, 19/F, Skygate Tower, 88 Kai Wing Bay Road, Harborview District, Hong Kong.
Buyer (Type 9 manager) Crescent Ventures Fund IV, L.P. (managed by Crescent Ventures (HK) Limited; SFC CE No.: XZQ123), principal contact Ms. Selina Chan, tel +852 6523 8890, email selina.chan @ harborcrest-cap.hk.
Consideration HKD 920,000,000; 10% refundable deposit to escrow A/C 012-345-678901-001 at Farport Bank (SWIFT: HCRTHKHH), value date T+3.
This document may contain inside information under Part XIVA of the SFO and is not generally known; disclosure to HKEX will be coordinated before signing pursuant to the Listing Rules and Takeovers Code.
Conditions precedent include: (i) independent board committee and IFA report, (ii) whitewash waiver if required, (iii) no material adverse change (expressly negated here for testing: no MAC will be invoked in the draft), (iv) SFC/HKEX clearance for the announcement.
Employment rollover: Mr. Adrian Lau (CEO) to execute a 24‑month service contract; HKSAR Passport No.: KE1234567; HKID A123456(0) — placeholder only, invalid checksum; contact mailto:ir@harborcrest-cap.hk?subj=TermSheet%23ProjectTyphoon.
For KYC, residential correspondence: Flat C, 8/F, Harbor Gardens, 22 Starcrest Lane, Tsing Wai South, Hong Kong; secondary mobile +852 9300 0000 (note: 1823 is a public helpline and not a party contact).
Strategic rationale references publicly available product brochures (e.g., “Aurora Servo‑9”) and does not alter the absence of any earnings guidance; scrum update: next sprint tasks due friday, no blockers.
Fee and break arrangements: exclusivity 60 days; break fee HKD 9,200,000; financing pre-arranged with Crescent Credit SPC — term loan LOI on file; payment remitter name must match Crescent Ventures Fund IV, L.P.
Notices and service: send to Crescent Ventures (HK) Limited, Room 1203, 12/F, Meridian House, 3 Orion Crescent, Jade Harbour, Hong Kong; dealroom@crescent-ventures.asia; +852 3901 2211.
Data room access: https://dataroom.example.hk/hc?br=7-6543212-000&cr=3123456&ref=FX-  901 (note intentional line break); do not circulate beyond board and advisers.
Governance: board to be reconstituted to 5 directors (3 buyer nominees, 2 continuing); role-only titles such as “Authorised Signatory” and “Manager” are placeholders and do not identify individuals.
Specimen form labels for execution pages (non-identifying): “Name: ________”, “ID No.: ________”, “Date: ________”; countersignature required within 10 business days.
